scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -k -n shared,server,client -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w shared
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w client && npm run lint:fix -w server && npm run lint:fix -w shared
